data.title: Standard Chartered Executes Share Buy-back to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ) has shared an announcement.

Standard Chartered PLC has executed a share buy-back program, purchasing 1,150,000 of its ordinary shares at prices ranging from 1,183.5 to 1,199.0 GB pence. The company plans to cancel these shares, reducing the total number of shares in issue to 2,395,673,854, which will also be the total number of voting rights. This move is part of a strategic effort to manage the company’s share capital and potentially enhance shareholder value.

More about Standard Chartered

Standard Chartered PLC is a multinational banking and financial services company headquartered in London, England. It operates primarily in Asia, Africa, and the Middle East, providing a range of services including personal banking, corporate banking, and wealth management.

YTD Price Performance: 28.46%

Average Trading Volume: 6,422

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $37.33B

data.title: Morrow Bank ASA Announces Annual General Meeting and Key Agenda Items
data.description:
Komplett Bank ASA ( (DE:KBN) ) has shared an update.

Morrow Bank ASA has announced its annual general meeting scheduled for April 10, 2025, in Lysaker, Norway. Key agenda items include the approval of the 2024 annual accounts and a proposed dividend distribution of NOK 0.4 per share. Additionally, the meeting will cover the approval of auditor remuneration, board member elections, and an authorization for the board to increase share capital in relation to the company’s option scheme.

More about Komplett Bank ASA

data.title: Elsem Pty Ltd and Anna Strachan Cease to be Substantial Holders in PeopleIn Limited
data.description:
Peoplein Limited ( (AU:PPE) ) has provided an announcement.

Elsem Pty Ltd and Anna Strachan have ceased to be substantial holders in PeopleIn Limited as of March 18, 2025. This change occurred due to the on-market sale of shares by Elsem Pty Ltd, acting as trustee for the T&A Strachan Family Trust and the Strachan Family Trust, resulting in a significant reduction of their voting securities in the company.

data.title: Nano One Secures C$12.75 Million for LFP Commercialization
data.description:
Nano One Materials ( (TSE:NANO) ) has issued an announcement.

Nano One Materials Corp. has received C$12.75 million in non-dilutive cash contributions from various government programs, supporting its lithium-iron-phosphate (LFP) commercialization initiatives. This funding strengthens the company’s financial position, enabling it to advance its capacity expansion, production, and licensing plans through 2025. The funds, part of a larger C$45 million government award, underscore the strategic importance of Nano One’s One-Pot process for energy and supply chain security, adding shareholder value and supporting the company’s corporate objectives. The contributions also bolster engineering feasibility efforts for Nano One’s design-one-build-many licensing growth strategy.

More about Nano One Materials

Nano One Materials Corp. is a technology company focused on revolutionizing the production of cathode active materials for lithium-ion batteries. Their patented One-Pot process aims to reduce costs, environmental impact, and reliance on problematic supply chains. The company targets applications in stationary energy storage systems, portable electronics, and electric vehicles, with a focus on enhancing energy security, supply chain resilience, and industrial competitiveness.

YTD Price Performance: -27.59%

Average Trading Volume: 71,141

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$69.09M

data.title: Iberdrola Launches €375 Million Green Bond Linked to Share Value
data.description:
Iberdrola ( (ES:IBE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Iberdrola has announced the launch of a green bond issuance valued at approximately 375 million euros, linked to the company’s share value. This initiative, which is guaranteed by Iberdrola, aims to enhance the company’s financial strategies while reinforcing its commitment to sustainability. The bonds, with a five-year maturity, will be traded on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange, and the issuance includes mechanisms to manage financial exposure through cash-settled call options. This move is expected to strengthen Iberdrola’s market position and provide stakeholders with a sustainable investment opportunity.

More about Iberdrola

Iberdrola is a leading multinational company in the energy industry, primarily focused on the production and distribution of electricity. The company is known for its commitment to renewable energy sources and sustainability, positioning itself as a key player in the transition to green energy solutions.

YTD Price Performance: 7.44%

Average Trading Volume: 2,238,310

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €89.26B

data.title: Arrow Minerals Announces Proposed Securities Issue to Bolster Exploration Efforts
data.description:
Arrow Minerals Limited ( (AU:AMD) ) has issued an update.

Arrow Minerals Limited has announced a proposed issue of securities, which includes 20 million options and 10 million performance rights, both expiring on December 31, 2028. This strategic move is aimed at strengthening the company’s financial position and supporting its ongoing exploration and development activities, potentially impacting its market positioning and offering new opportunities for stakeholders.

More about Arrow Minerals Limited

Arrow Minerals Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is primarily involved in the discovery and development of mineral deposits, with a market focus on expanding its resource base and enhancing shareholder value.

data.title: Diversified Energy Announces Fixed Income Investor Meetings and Bond Offering
data.description:
Diversified Energy Company ( (GB:DEC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Diversified Energy Company PLC has announced plans to hold a series of fixed income investor calls starting March 24, 2025, with DNB Markets as the sole bookrunner. The company intends to offer four-year US$ denominated senior secured notes to repay existing debt and for general corporate purposes, targeting qualified institutional buyers in the U.S. The move is part of Diversified’s strategy to strengthen its financial position and enhance its operational capabilities, potentially impacting its market standing and stakeholder interests.

More about Diversified Energy Company

Diversified Energy Company PLC is a leading publicly traded energy company focused on the production, transportation, marketing, and retirement of natural gas and liquids. The company employs a unique strategy of acquiring long-life assets and investing in them to enhance environmental and operational performance, ultimately retiring these assets in a safe and environmentally secure manner. Diversified is recognized for its sustainability leadership and aims to responsibly produce energy, deliver reliable cash flow, and generate shareholder value.

Average Trading Volume: 164,654

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: £811.5M

data.title: British American Tobacco Executes Share Buyback Program
data.description:
British American Tobacco ( (GB:BATS) ) just unveiled an update.

British American Tobacco has executed a share buyback, purchasing 108,258 of its ordinary shares as part of a previously announced program. The company intends to cancel these shares, which will result in a reduction of its total shares in issue, potentially impacting shareholder interests and voting rights.

More about British American Tobacco

British American Tobacco p.l.c. is a leading company in the tobacco industry, primarily engaged in the production and sale of cigarettes and other nicotine products. The company operates globally, focusing on delivering high-quality tobacco products to its consumers while also exploring reduced-risk alternatives.

data.title: Kerry Group Advances €300 Million Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Kerry Group plc ( (GB:KYGA) ) has issued an announcement.

Kerry Group plc has announced the purchase and subsequent cancellation of 29,947 of its A ordinary shares on Euronext Dublin as part of its ongoing share buyback program. This transaction is part of a broader initiative to repurchase shares worth up to €300 million by June 2025, which could potentially enhance shareholder value and optimize the company’s capital structure.

More about Kerry Group plc

Kerry Group plc is a company operating in the food and beverage industry, focusing on the development and production of taste and nutrition solutions. It serves a global market, providing products and services that enhance the taste and nutritional profile of food and beverages.
